action sentence: Take a Gel Band Cutter to slice the DNA fragment from an agarose gel.
Transfer the gel slice into a labeled microfuge tube.
Add 500 µl of Binding Buffer GP1 to the sample.
Incubate at 55℃ for 10-15 minutes until the gel slice has been completely dissolved.
Place a FastGene® GP Column into a Collection Tube.
Apply up to 800 µl of the sample mixture from previous step into the FastGene® GP Column.
Place the FastGene® GP Column back into the Collection Tube.
Add 600 µl Wash Buffer GP2 to the FastGene® GP Column.
Place the FastGene® GP Column back into the Collection Tube.
Centrifuge again for 2 minutes at 13,000 rpm to dry the column matrix.
Transfer FastGene® GP Column into a new microcentrifuge tube.
Add 20 ml of Elution Buffer GP3 to the centre of the column matrix.
Centrifuge at 13,000 rpm for 2 min to elute purified DNA.
